news.title: Father detained after child accidentally shot in SW Atlanta
news.summary: An accidental weapon discharge in a southwest Atlanta neighborhood on Tuesday afternoon left a young child hospitalized and a father in police custody.

news.title: Road rage incident ends with driver being shot while getting off Georgia interstate
news.summary: Driver taken into custody after road rage shooting on I-85 off-ramp in Hogansville. Victim with non-life-threatening gunshot wound.

news.title: Two arrested in Brookhaven massage business probe
news.summary: A Brookhaven police investigation into a local massage establishment led to the arrest of two people, authorities announced Tuesday.

news.title: Brookhaven business owner, massage therapist arrested after investigation, police say
news.summary: Brookhaven Police officers responded to a complaint at the Balance & Relax Massage, located at 2484 Briarcliff Road.

news.title: Boyfriend of mother found dead in Atlanta home in 1999 cold case charged with murder
news.summary: An autopsy was completed in 1999, but those results were never communicated to the Atlanta Police Homicide Unit, leaving the case unsolved until now.

news.title: Driver shot in road rage incident on southbound I-85 in Hogansville
news.summary: A motorist dodged a hail of gunfire on the interstate before leading police directly to the shooter during a high-stakes pursuit across Georgia county lines.

news.title: Employee at Smyrna mental health facility arrested for raping underage patient, warrants reveal
news.summary: ​The assault was reported to the facility on April 16, and an internal investigation began.

news.title: Men charged federally with threatening Jewish employees at Atlanta-based Flock Safety, PrizePicks
news.summary: The arrest marks the fourth person in 12 months to be federally charged in the Northern District of Georgia, including two Georgia men.

news.title: Child shot in hand during accidental gun discharge, APD says
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a reported accidental discharge of a gun that left a child injured Tuesday in southwest Atlanta.

news.title: 1-year-old shot in accidental gunfire in southwest Atlanta
news.summary: Police said the child was alert, conscious and breathing when officers responded.

news.title: Woodstock man gets 30-year sentence for fentanyl, meth trafficking
news.summary: Quentodd Montell Pinkins, a Woodstock man, has been sentenced to 30 years after pleading guilty to multiple fentanyl and methamphetamine charges

news.title: Person shot in road rage incident on I-85 in Hogansville, police seeking witnesses
news.summary: The Hogansville Police Department said that the incident happened Monday evening, with the victim's injuries not considered life-threatening.

news.title: 1 person, 1 pet found dead after mobile home park fire in Spalding Co.
news.summary: One person and a pet died in an early morning fire at a Spalding County mobile home park.

news.title: Woman shot while sitting next to boyfriend on porch after gunfire comes from woods in Jonesboro
news.summary: Police said that one person was rushed to the hospital and nobody is yet in custody.

news.title: Gunshots fired from woods hit woman on Jonesboro patio
news.summary: An evening on a back patio turned into chaos when gunfire erupted from the nearby woods, hitting a woman and sparking an active search by Clayton County police.
